description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal blade with a pronounced cutting edge and a slight beard, giving it a traditional yet practical appearance. The blade is securely mounted onto a wooden handle, which is wrapped in a textured, tan-colored grip material, likely leather or cord, for enhanced handling and comfort. The handle is straight with a subtle taper and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, showing some natural grain and coloration. The blade has a matte finish and may include some decorative or functional etchings on one side. The overall construction suggests durability and utility, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. This axe would commonly be found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance areas.
description: A traditional hand axe with a dark metal blade and a straight, wood handle wrapped in tan grip material. The blade features a pronounced edge and possible etchings, while the handle is designed for secure, comfortable use.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a side angle, highlighting the full profile of the blade and the wrapped handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top down the handle, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the axe, revealing the other face of the blade and the full length of the handle wrap.
description_view_3: The axe is viewed edge-on from the blade, emphasizing the thickness of the blade and the alignment with the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical with a slight taper, wrapped in tan grip material for enhanced hold.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wide blade with a pronounced beard and a slightly curved cutting edge; matte finish with possible etchings.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured, possibly with a wedge or pin.
